This plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Ornithogalum hesquaspoortense include saponins, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional South African medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or infused in water to treat various ailments, and it is also used in herbal remedies to support immune function and reduce inflammation.
